resolved_blocker.summary: The checked-in C reconnect path does not satisfy hello-first ordering on replacement connections
evidence: capture/src/main.c packet_handler calls uds_reconnect after UDS_ERR_PIPE without calling uds_send_hello
capture/src/uds_sender.c uds_reconnect only opens the replacement socket
resolved_blocker.impact: Receiver-only enforcement would close a valid checked-in capture reconnect on its next packet or heartbeat
resolved_blocker.resolution: The user explicitly authorized the C reconnect-handshake change on 2026-07-20

remaining_risks: Connection session state must remain local across concurrent clients
Every state violation must close only its connection and increment decode errors once
